SEARCH
Package com.dua3.utility.ui

Interface DetachableNode<N,P>

Type Parameters:
N - the type of the node
P - the type of the parent nodes
All Known Implementing Classes:
ToolBarEx
public interface DetachableNode<N,P>
Interface for a node that can be detached from its parent.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static enum 
    DetachableNode.Location
    Enum representing the possible locations or visibility states for a detachable node.
    static interface 
    DetachableNode.LocationListener
    Functional interface for receiving notifications when the location or visibility state of a DetachableNode changes.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addLocationListener(DetachableNode.LocationListener listener)
    Registers a DetachableNode.LocationListener to receive updates when the location or visibility state of a DetachableNode changes.
    DetachableNode.Location
    getLocation()
    Gets the location of the node.
    N
    getNode()
    Returns the actual UI component (e.g., JToolBar or ToolBar) so containers can add/remove it dynamically.
    boolean
    removeLocationListener(DetachableNode.LocationListener listener)
    Removes a previously registered location listener from the node.
    void
    setApplicationParent(@Nullable P parent)
    Sets the parent for the current application context of the node and manages the addition or removal process of the node into/from the parent.
    void
    setLocation(DetachableNode.Location location)
    Sets the current location or visibility of the node.

  • Method Details

    • addLocationListener

      void addLocationListener(DetachableNode.LocationListener listener)
      Registers a DetachableNode.LocationListener to receive updates when the location or visibility state of a DetachableNode changes.
      Parameters:
      listener - the LocationListener instance to be notified of location changes; must not be null.

    • removeLocationListener

      boolean removeLocationListener(DetachableNode.LocationListener listener)
      Removes a previously registered location listener from the node. The location listener will no longer receive updates when the node's location changes.
      Parameters:
      listener - the DetachableNode.LocationListener to be removed; must not be null and should already be registered
      Returns:
      true if the listener was contained in the list of listeners

    • setLocation

      void setLocation(DetachableNode.Location location)
      Sets the current location or visibility of the node.
      Parameters:
      location - the new location or visibility state of the node

    • getLocation

      DetachableNode.Location getLocation()
      Gets the location of the node.
      Returns:
      the current location or visibility state of the node

    • getNode

      N getNode()
      Returns the actual UI component (e.g., JToolBar or ToolBar) so containers can add/remove it dynamically.
      Returns:
      the actual UI component

    • setApplicationParent

      void setApplicationParent(@Nullable P parent)
      Sets the parent for the current application context of the node and manages the addition or removal process of the node into/from the parent.
      Parameters:
      parent - the parent node to assign to the node; may be null to indicate no parent
